title: Pass 5.F.2: ferrotorch-distributions kl.rs supported-pairs table stale (lists 6, registers 11)
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-distributions audit, DOC_DRIFT.

src/kl.rs:36-46 — supported-pairs table lists only 6 rows; dispatcher actually registers 11 pairs (Laplace, Exponential, Gamma, Poisson, Gamma-Exp, Exp-Gamma added by CL-365). Error message at line 149-156 is up to date — table is not.

Acceptance:
- Update the doc table to reflect all 11 registered pairs
- Add a test that asserts the table count matches the dispatcher's registered count (so future drift fails fast).
